summary: Open the local mirror read-only (store.OpenReadOnly) for the read-only analytics commands, and warn on stderr when loadCatalog materializes a very large row set.
reason: Analytics commands (top, rank, gaps, pod, kit) never write, so a read-write open needlessly runs migrations and takes the WAL write lock; read-only also rejects writes at the driver level. The stderr note makes the memory cost of an unusually large mirror visible without polluting stdout/--json (Greptile P2 on catalog.go).
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass; live dogfood gate re-run green.
